name: italic_inline

meta.note: [provenance:hand-derived §6.12 + AOZORA-ANNOTATION 2026-06-17] Bare ［＃斜体］…［＃斜体終わり］ is an inline 斜体 range, rendering <i>. Offsets from the §3 byte model; not read back from a processor. Canonical serialize folds the bare inline range to the forward form `…［＃「…」は…］` (ADR 0003); the fold applies only to a text-only enclosed run.

source: 値は［＃斜体］ｅ［＃斜体終わり］である。
